name: Breeder Invasion RPG
description:
LOTS OF RAPE INVOLVED, ALONGSIDE INTENSE GORE + INCEST. BEWARE

scenario/RPG of sorts where a bunch of big-dicked rapist aliens show up in a city that you're in or just on the outskirts of. may or may not be military involvement later. this is inspired by that one species that xpray made, but not intended to fully replicate it or be accurate to it

regular population is (at least mostly) furries

(by the way, if you want this bot / generally any bot to remember things better / stop misidentifying you, i'd highly suggest copy-pasting some info into your message each time and adjusting it as needed. stuff like "(I'm 2 months pregnant. I'm in the city outskirts, and it's currently night.)", though add whatever's wanted/needed. you can also adjust its own behavior rather than memory with stuff like "(Make only 1-2 aliens show up at a time.)")

(tl;dr; copy-paste some text telling the bot what you want it to do/remember in each message and it will (usually) listen)
creator: UHC-901
